name: UAC Remote Restrictions Disabled
notes:
This rule detects registry modification allowing remote administrative actions.

Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Steven Dick, Teoderick Contreras, Splunk
SIGMA Title: Disable UAC Remote Restriction
SIGMA Description: This analytic is to detect a suspicious modification of registry to disable UAC remote restriction.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification
when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES '(hklm\\.*\\localaccounttokenfilterpolicy|\\registry\\machine\\.*\\localaccounttokenfilterpolicy)' AQL filter query
when the event matches Registry Value Data (custom) contains any of [1 or 0x00000001]
TD_list: APPLY UAC Remote Restrictions Disabled on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification
AND when the event matches LOWER("Registry Key") MATCHES '(hklm\\.*\\localaccounttokenfilterpolicy|\\registry\\machine\\.*\\localaccounttokenfilterpolicy)' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Registry Value Data (custom) contains any of [1 or 0x00000001]
RED_list: Event name: UAC Remote Restrictions Disabled
Event description: Detect a suspicious modification of registry to disable UAC remote restriction.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
